goal: Add a side-effect-free execution preflight builder that validates memory-cache audit export consume application authority is ready for later execution while keeping permit consume, file writes, durable persistence, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and external actions closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, write export files, persist durable state, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or perform external actions.
claims: Ready memory-cache audit export consume application authority can be preflighted for later execution without applying it.
Execution preflight ref, executor ref, and execution policy ref are required.
Permit consume and file writes remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing execution ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, file write, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-128 recorded side-effect-free memory-cache audit export consume application authority without consuming the permit or writing a file.
